raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A black bowl is on a wooden table. A blue tray with a red apple and a yellow cup is on the right. A yellow cup is on the table. A blue cup is on the table. An orange is on the table. A yellow block is on the table. The black bowl is a rigid container with a rim; it is on the table. STRATEGY - Reach the bowl at its rim for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to a destination (e.g., the blue tray). Failure modes include dropping the bowl during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl rim; Step 2 grasp the rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the tray; Step 4 place on the tray.

Goal: on(black_bowl, blue_tray); stable(black_bowl)
Scene: black_bowl, blue_tray, table, yellow_cup, blue_cup, orange, yellow_block, red_apple
Step 1: reach(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: holding(black_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_bowl)
Step 3: transport(black_bowl -> blue_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue tray
  spatial: above(black_bowl, blue_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_bowl)
  done_when: above(black_bowl, blue_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_bowl -> blue_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue tray
  contact: surface_contact(black_bowl, blue_tray) [completion]; released(black_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_bowl, blue_tray) AND released(black_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
the rim of the black bowl
an empty area on the blue tray
an empty area on the blue tray
